custom_description:
Zendesk Support is a customer service platform that helps businesses manage support
tickets, customer interactions, and help center content. This connector provides
access to tickets, users, organizations, groups, comments, attachments, automations,
triggers, macros, views, satisfaction ratings, SLA policies, and help center articles
for customer support analytics and service performance insights.
supported_questions:
- Show me the tickets assigned to me last week
- List all unresolved tickets
- Show me the details of recent tickets
- Create a new ticket with subject 'Login issue' and priority high
- Update ticket 12345 to status solved
- Add a comment to ticket 12345 saying 'This has been resolved'
- Set the priority of ticket 12345 to urgent and assign it to agent 98765
- Create a new end-user named 'Jane Doe' with email jane@example.com
- Update user 54321 with notes 'VIP customer'
- What are the top 5 support issues our organization has faced this month?
- Analyze the satisfaction ratings for our support team in the last 30 days
- Compare ticket resolution times across different support groups
- Identify the most common ticket fields used in our support workflow
- Summarize the performance of our SLA policies this quarter
unsupported_questions:
- Delete these old support tickets
- Merge two tickets together
- Export all tickets to a CSV file

fields.name: active

fields.name: name

fields.description: Specific classification of the event within the ticket event stream

fields.description: HTML-formatted content of the comment

fields.description: Unique identifier for the comment event

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Additional structured information about the comment not covered by standard fields

fields.name: plain_body
fields.description: Plain text content of the comment without formatting

fields.name: public
fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the comment is visible to end users or is an internal note

fields.name: ticket_id

fields.description: Timestamp of when the event occurred in the incremental export stream

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of event, typically indicating this is a comment event

fields.name: uploads
fields.description: Array of upload tokens or identifiers for files being attached to the comment

fields.name: via
fields.description: Channel or method through which the comment was submitted

fields.name: via_reference_id
fields.description: Reference identifier for the channel through which the comment was created

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether this field is currently available for use

fields.name: agent_description
fields.description: A description of the ticket field that only agents can see

fields.name: collapsed_for_agents
fields.description: If true, the field is shown to agents by default; if false, it is hidden alongside infrequently used fields

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the custom ticket field was created

fields.name: custom_field_options
fields.description: Array of option objects for custom ticket fields of type multiselect or tagger

fields.name: custom_statuses
fields.description: List of customized ticket statuses, only present for system ticket fields of type custom_status

fields.name: description
fields.description: Text describing the purpose of the ticket field to users

fields.name: editable_in_portal
fields.description: Whether this field is editable by end users in Help Center

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the ticket field, automatically assigned when created

fields.name: key
fields.description: Internal identifier or reference key for the field

fields.name: position
fields.description: The relative position of the ticket field on a ticket, controlling display order

fields.name: raw_description
fields.description: The dynamic content placeholder if present, or the description value if not

fields.name: raw_title
fields.description: The dynamic content placeholder if present, or the title value if not

fields.name: raw_title_in_portal
fields.description: The dynamic content placeholder if present, or the title_in_portal value if not

fields.name: regexp_for_validation
fields.description: For regexp fields only, the validation pattern for a field value to be deemed valid

fields.name: removable
fields.description: If false, this field is a system field that must be present on all tickets

fields.name: required
fields.description: If true, agents must enter a value in the field to change the ticket status to solved

fields.name: required_in_portal
fields.description: If true, end users must enter a value in the field to create a request

fields.name: sub_type_id
fields.description: For system ticket fields of type priority and status, controlling available options

fields.name: system_field_options
fields.description: Array of options for system ticket fields of type tickettype, priority, or status

fields.name: tag
fields.description: For checkbox fields only, a tag added to tickets when the checkbox field is selected

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the ticket field displayed to agents

fields.name: title_in_portal
fields.description: The title of the ticket field displayed to end users in Help Center

fields.name: type
fields.description: Field type such as text, textarea, checkbox, date, integer, decimal, regexp, multiselect, or tagger

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the custom ticket field was last updated

fields.name: url
fields.description: The API URL for this ticket field resource

fields.name: visible_in_portal
fields.description: Whether this field is visible to end users in Help Center

fields.description: Indicates if the form is set as active

fields.description: Array of condition sets for agent workspaces

fields.description: Number of minutes on hold

fields.name: requester_updated_at

fields.name: solved_at

fields.name: status

fields.name: status_updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the status of the ticket was last updated

fields.name: ticket_id

fields.name: time
fields.description: Time related to the ticket

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of ticket

fields.name: updated_at

fields.name: url

fields.name: allow_attachments

fields.name: collaborator_ids

fields.name: custom_fields

fields.description: Timestamp updated for all ticket updates including system changes, used for incremental export

fields.description: Unique identifier of the agent group assigned to handle the ticket

fields.description: Boolean indicating whether this problem ticket has related incident tickets

fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the ticket is publicly visible

fields.name: organization_id

fields.description: Priority level assigned to the ticket (e.g., urgent, high, normal, low)

fields.name: problem_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the problem ticket if this is an incident ticket

fields.name: raw_subject
fields.description: Original unprocessed subject line before any system modifications

fields.name: recipient
fields.description: Email address or identifier of the ticket recipient

fields.name: requester_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the user who requested or created the ticket

fields.name: satisfaction_rating
fields.description: Object containing customer satisfaction rating data for the ticket

fields.name: sharing_agreement_ids
fields.description: Array of sharing agreement identifiers if the ticket is shared across Zendesk instances

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the ticket (e.g., new, open, pending, solved, closed)

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Subject line of the ticket describing the issue or request

fields.name: submitter_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the user who submitted the ticket on behalf of the requester

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Array of tags applied to the ticket for categorization and filtering

fields.name: ticket_form_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the ticket form used when creating the ticket

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of ticket (e.g., problem, incident, question, task)

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the ticket was last updated with a ticket event

fields.name: url
fields.description: API URL to access the full ticket resource

fields.name: result_type
fields.description: The type of the search result (e.g. ticket) when returned from search endpoints

fields.name: via
fields.description: Object describing the channel and method through which the ticket was created

fields.description: Additional details or comments about the deleted ticket

fields.description: The timestamp when the ticket was deleted

fields.description: The state of the ticket before it was deleted

fields.description: Additional descriptive information about the user

fields.description: External system identifier for the user, used for integrations

fields.description: IANA standard time zone identifier for the user

fields.description: Unique identifier for the user

fields.name: last_login_at
fields.description: Timestamp of the user's most recent login

fields.description: Locale setting determining language and regional format preferences

fields.description: Identifier for the user's locale preference

fields.name: moderator
fields.description: Indicates if the user has moderator privileges

fields.description: Internal notes about the user, visible only to agents

fields.description: Indicates if the user can only make private comments on tickets

fields.description: Indicates if the user receives reports in CSV format

fields.description: Indicates if the agent has restricted access permissions

fields.description: Role assigned to the user defining their permissions level

fields.description: Indicates if the user is a shared agent across multiple brands or accounts

fields.description: Indicates if the phone number is shared with other users

fields.name: suspended
fields.description: Indicates if the user account is suspended

fields.description: Defines which tickets the user can access based on restrictions

fields.name: time_zone
fields.description: Time zone setting for the user

fields.name: two_factor_auth_enabled
fields.description: Indicates if two-factor authentication is enabled for the user

fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the user was last updated

fields.name: url
fields.description: API endpoint URL for accessing the user's detailed information

fields.name: user_fields
fields.description: Custom field values specific to the user, stored as key-value pairs

fields.description: Indicates if the user's identity has been verified
